TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Henri, title = Henri, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Henri} }

S.FORM: == Henri == ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, Henri, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1955) mrhuw Luxembourg ta' misuw hya' ga Henri, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2000 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan Henri maki tay kawas 1981 msqun ki Maria Teresa, tehuk misuw qani. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Henri == ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, Henri, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1955) mrhuw Luxembourg ta' misuw hya' ga Henri, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2000 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qnxan Henri maki tay kawas 1981 msqun ki Maria Teresa, tehuk misuw qani. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == ħenri == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ħenri, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw luxemβourɣ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa ħenri, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qnxan ħenri maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki maria teres~ɕa, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
